Professional Services

Security Engineer - Responsible for performing configuration/deployment and verification and verification of the security platform. $285/hr

  • SHI has right of refusal – we will have to mutually agree on the service request (work has to be mutually agreed upon)
  • Hours have to be consumed at a minimum of daily increments
  • SHI requires two weeks of notice prior to scheduling
  • All services requests require full SOWs between SHI and Customer
